best_unix_strategy:
awk -v RS='^#+' -v ORS='
' '/^## Architecture$/{nextsec="";linecount=0} /^### /{if (nextsec=="" && $0 ~ /^## User Management$/) {sub("^### ", "  ### ", $0); print; nextsec=""; linecount=0} else if (nextsec=="" && $0 ~ /^## User Management$/) {nextsec=""; linecount=0} else {print}} /^## User Management$/{nextsec=""; linecount=0; next} /^## /{print; linecount=0} {print} END{exit}' ORS RS input.md > output.md
rationale: The task requires understanding heading hierarchy and inserting content at a nested position, which is not reliably solvable with line-oriented tools like awk that cannot track structural context across the document.
